funcbody:
func (l *LayoutHandler) For(d LayoutDescriptor) ([]string, error) {

	l.mu.RLock()
	if cacheVal, found := l.cache[d]; found {
		l.mu.RUnlock()
		return cacheVal, nil
	}
	l.mu.RUnlock()

	layouts := resolvePageTemplate(d)

	layouts = uniqueStringsReuse(layouts)

	l.mu.Lock()
	l.cache[d] = layouts
	l.mu.Unlock()

	return layouts, nil
}
